requirement_topic.en: Market Access Reality — No Confirmed Strong NSB and Essentially Non-Existent EVSE Market
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入现实——未确认强有力国家标准机构且EVSE市场基本不存在
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入現實——未確認強有力國家標準機構且EVSE市場基本不存在

summary.en: Eritrea should be described honestly as a very early or essentially non-existent EV charging market. No strong national standards body or EVSE-specific conformity-assessment route was confirmed from the reviewed baseline. The practical market-access path is likely to be project-specific: confirm importer obligations, customs classification, public-authority acceptance, EEC connection requirements, applicable IEC evidence, and any donor or fleet-owner specifications before shipment. Eritrea's low electrification, isolated economy, and nascent solar development mean deployment feasibility may depend more on site power availability and project finance than on a published EVSE product certificate.
summary.zh: 应诚实地将厄立特里亚描述为非常早期或基本不存在的电动汽车充电市场。基线审查未确认其存在强有力的国家标准机构或EVSE专用合格评定路径。实际市场准入路径很可能是项目特定的：出货前确认进口商义务、海关归类、公共主管机构认可、EEC接入要求、适用IEC证据，以及任何捐助方或车队业主规范。厄立特里亚电气化率低、经济相对孤立且太阳能发展刚起步，部署可行性可能更多取决于现场供电能力和项目融资，而不是已发布的EVSE产品证书。
summary.zht: 應誠實地將厄利垂亞描述為非常早期或基本不存在的電動汽車充電市場。基線審查未確認其存在強有力的國家標準機構或EVSE專用合格評定路徑。實際市場准入路徑很可能是項目特定的：出貨前確認進口商義務、海關歸類、公共主管機構認可、EEC接入要求、適用IEC證據，以及任何捐助方或車隊業主規範。厄利垂亞電氣化率低、經濟相對孤立且太陽能發展剛起步，部署可行性可能更多取決於現場供電能力和項目融資，而不是已發布的EVSE產品證書。

standards_or_laws: Eritrea public authority import and customs requirements to be confirmed per shipment
Eritrean Electricity Corporation project connection requirements
IEC 61851, IEC 62196 and IEC 61000 evidence where specified by project owner, donor, or operator

summary.en: China has a mature EV and charging-infrastructure market with domestic GB/T standards, large-scale operators, grid-company acceptance processes, and established charger supply chains. That domestic maturity does not translate into automatic Eritrea market access, especially where the target project expects IEC connectors and IEC safety evidence instead of GB/T hardware and reports.
summary.zh: 中国拥有成熟的电动汽车和充电基础设施市场，配套国内GB/T标准、大型运营商、电网公司验收流程和成熟充电桩供应链。这种国内成熟度不能自动转化为厄立特里亚市场准入，尤其是在目标项目预期采用IEC接口和IEC安全证据，而非GB/T硬件和报告时。
summary.zht: 中國擁有成熟的電動汽車和充電基礎設施市場，配套國內GB/T標準、大型運營商、電網公司驗收流程和成熟充電樁供應鏈。這種國內成熟度不能自動轉化為厄利垂亞市場准入，尤其是在目標項目預期採用IEC接口和IEC安全證據，而非GB/T硬體和報告時。

standards_or_laws: China domestic charger operator and grid-acceptance practices

gap.en: The practical gap is uncertainty management. Exporters should not market Eritrea as a ready-made EVSE standards market. Before quoting, confirm the project sponsor, vehicle fleet, connector type, EEC power availability, import route, spare-parts and maintenance plan, site security, solar or backup power needs, and whether any international donor, EPC, or fleet owner imposes IEC test reports. The safest compliance file is an IEC-based project dossier plus explicit written acceptance from the relevant Eritrea counterparty.
gap.zh: 实际差距是管理不确定性。出口商不应将厄立特里亚宣传为已有成熟EVSE标准的市场。报价前应确认项目发起方、车辆车队、接口类型、EEC供电能力、进口路径、备件和维护计划、场地安全、太阳能或备用电源需求，以及是否有国际捐助方、EPC或车队业主要求IEC测试报告。最稳妥的合规文件是IEC体系项目资料包加相关厄立特里亚相对方的书面认可。
gap.zht: 實際差距是管理不確定性。出口商不應將厄利垂亞宣傳為已有成熟EVSE標準的市場。報價前應確認項目發起方、車輛車隊、接口類型、EEC供電能力、進口路徑、備件和維護計劃、場地安全、太陽能或備用電源需求，以及是否有國際捐助方、EPC或車隊業主要求IEC測試報告。最穩妥的合規文件是IEC體系項目資料包加相關厄利垂亞相對方的書面認可。

mandatory_status.target: Unconfirmed / project-specific — no confirmed EVSE-specific mandatory national conformity route or strong national standards body identified; verify with Eritrea counterparties before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic GB/T compliance and market maturity do not grant Eritrea market access

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Eritrea should be treated as a project-specific, early-stage EVSE market. Do not imply a confirmed national EV charger certification route. Build an IEC-based dossier and obtain written acceptance on import, grid, connector, and site requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将厄立特里亚视为项目特定、早期阶段的EVSE市场。不得暗示存在已确认的国家电动汽车充电桩认证路径。应建立IEC体系资料包，并在出货前取得关于进口、电网、接口和现场要求的书面认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將厄利垂亞視為項目特定、早期階段的EVSE市場。不得暗示存在已確認的國家電動汽車充電樁認證路徑。應建立IEC體系資料包，並在出貨前取得關於進口、電網、接口和現場要求的書面認可。
